<blockquote>
'''''Figure:''' Exemplary graph enabling a more meaningful analysis of the [[Glossary:Forgetting_index|forgetting index]]. Changes to [[Glossary:Forgetting_index|forgetting index]] in '''[[Analysis]]''' use the daily [[Glossary:Measured_forgetting_index|measured forgetting index]] (previously: less informative cumulative [[Glossary:Measured_forgetting_index|measured forgetting index]] value was taken for the entire period since the last use of '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Toolkit menu#Statistics|Statistics]] : Reset parameters : Forgetting index record'''). Note that the [[Glossary:Priority_queue|priority queue]] may distort the actual [[Glossary:Retention|retention]] in your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] as measured values are primarily taken from top-[[Glossary:Priority|priority]] material. Thus [[Glossary:Measured_forgetting_index|measured forgetting index]] should be understood as "forgetting index measured at repetitions", not as "overall measured forgetting index".''
</blockquote>
